# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

# EXTERNAL cache entries

//Disable explicit optimized code (dispatched code/intrinsics/loop
// unrolling/etc)
CV_DISABLE_OPTIMIZATION:BOOL=OFF

//Use intrinsic-based optimized code
CV_ENABLE_INTRINSICS:BOOL=ON

//Enable OpenCV code trace
CV_TRACE:BOOL=ON

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Ceres.
Ceres_DIR:PATH=Ceres_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Allow building and using of DNN plugins
DNN_ENABLE_PLUGINS:BOOL=ON

//List of DNN backends to be compiled as plugins (openvino, etc
// or special value 'all')
DNN_PLUGIN_LIST:STRING=

//The path to Eigen3/Eigen2 headers
EIGEN_INCLUDE_PATH:PATH=EIGEN_INCLUDE_PATH-NOTFOUND

//Enable hardening of the resulting binaries (against security
// attacks, detects memory corruption, etc)
ENABLE_BUILD_HARDENING:BOOL=OFF

//Use ccache
ENABLE_CCACHE:BOOL=OFF

//Fail build if actual configuration doesn't match requested (WITH_XXX
// != HAVE_XXX)
ENABLE_CONFIG_VERIFICATION:BOOL=OFF

//Enable CUDA as a first class language, if enabled dependant projects
// will need to use CMake >= 3.18
ENABLE_CUDA_FIRST_CLASS_LANGUAGE:BOOL=ON

//Enable delayed loading of OpenCV DLLs
ENABLE_DELAYLOAD:BOOL=OFF

//Enable compiler options for fast math optimizations on FP computations
// (not recommended)
ENABLE_FAST_MATH:BOOL=OFF

//Add target with Python flake8 checker
ENABLE_FLAKE8:BOOL=OFF

//Collect implementation data on function call
ENABLE_IMPL_COLLECTION:BOOL=OFF

//Instrument functions to collect calls trace and performance
ENABLE_INSTRUMENTATION:BOOL=OFF

//Include SIMD extensions for libjpeg-turbo, if available for this
// platform
ENABLE_LIBJPEG_TURBO_SIMD:BOOL=ON

//Enable Link Time Optimization
ENABLE_LTO:BOOL=OFF

//Show all warnings even if they are too noisy
ENABLE_NOISY_WARNINGS:BOOL=OFF

//Generate position independent code (necessary for shared libraries)
ENABLE_PIC:BOOL=ON

//Use precompiled headers
ENABLE_PRECOMPILED_HEADERS:BOOL=ON

//Add target with Pylint checks
ENABLE_PYLINT:BOOL=OFF

//Solution folder in Visual Studio or in other IDEs
ENABLE_SOLUTION_FOLDERS:BOOL=OFF

//Output directory for applications
EXECUTABLE_OUTPUT_PATH:PATH=C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/bin

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Eigen3.
Eigen3_DIR:PATH=Eigen3_DIR-NOTFOUND

OPENCV_DISABLE_FILESYSTEM_SUPPORT:BOOL=OFF

//List of download tries

//Dump called OpenCV hooks
OPENCV_DUMP_HOOKS_FLOW:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Allocator metrics
OPENCV_ENABLE_ALLOCATOR_STATS:BOOL=ON

//Enable C++ compiler support for atomic<long long>
OPENCV_ENABLE_ATOMIC_LONG_LONG:BOOL=ON

//Enable posix_memalign or memalign usage
OPENCV_ENABLE_MEMALIGN:BOOL=ON

//Better support for memory/address sanitizers
OPENCV_ENABLE_MEMORY_SANITIZER:BOOL=OFF

//Enable non-free algorithms
OPENCV_ENABLE_NONFREE:BOOL=OFF

//Where to look for additional OpenCV modules (can be ;-separated
// list of paths)
OPENCV_EXTRA_MODULES_PATH:PATH=C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv_contrib-4x/modules

OPENCV_FFMPEG_ENABLE_LIBAVDEVICE:BOOL=ON

//Force using 3rdparty code from source
OPENCV_FORCE_3RDPARTY_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Generate .pc file for pkg-config build tool (deprecated)
OPENCV_GENERATE_PKGCONFIG:BOOL=OFF

//Generate setup_vars* scripts

OPENCV_MATHJAX_RELPATH:STRING=https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3.0.1

//Python3 version
OPENCV_PYTHON3_VERSION:BOOL=OFF

//Timestamp of OpenCV build configuration
OPENCV_TIMESTAMP:STRING=2026-04-14T13:08:05Z

//Treat warnings as errors
OPENCV_WARNINGS_ARE_ERRORS:BOOL=OFF

OPENEXR_HALF_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=OPENEXR_HALF_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Path to a file.

//Path to the OpenEXR "Deploy" folder
OPENEXR_ROOT:STRING=C:/Deploy

//Disable TPsot==TNsot fix. See https://github.com/uclouvain/openjpeg/issues/254.
OPJ_DISABLE_TPSOT_FIX:BOOL=OFF

OPJ_USE_THREAD:BOOL=ON

OpenMP_C_LIB_NAMES:STRING=

PARALLEL_ENABLE_PLUGINS:BOOL=ON

//Enable Hardware Optimizations, if available for this platform
PNG_HARDWARE_OPTIMIZATIONS:BOOL=ON

//Enable INTEL_SSE optimizations: on|off; on is default
PNG_INTEL_SSE:STRING=on

//Force rebuilding .proto files (protoc should be available)
PROTOBUF_UPDATE_FILES:BOOL=OFF

//Path to Python interpreter
PYTHON3_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=C:/FinCap/backend/.venv/Scripts/python.exe

//Python include dir
PYTHON3_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=C:/mypython/include

//Python include dir 2
PYTHON3_INCLUDE_DIR2:PATH=

//Path to Python library
PYTHON3_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=C:/mypython/libs/python312.lib

//Path to Python debug
PYTHON3_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=PYTHON_DEBUG_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Build with Python Limited API (not available with numpy >=1.15
// <1.17)
PYTHON3_LIMITED_API:BOOL=OFF

//Path to numpy headers
PYTHON3_NUMPY_INCLUDE_DIRS:PATH=C:/FinCap/backend/.venv/Lib/site-packages/numpy/_core/include

//Where to install the python packages.
PYTHON3_PACKAGES_PATH:STRING=/registry/Lib/site-packages

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for Tesseract.
Tesseract_DIR:PATH=Tesseract_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a file.
Tesseract_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=Tesseract_INCLUDE_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
Tesseract_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=Tesseract_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Use win32 IO system (Microsoft Windows only)
USE_WIN32_FILEIO:BOOL=TRUE

//Allow building and using of videoio plugins
VIDEOIO_ENABLE_PLUGINS:BOOL=ON

//List of videoio backends to be compiled as plugins (ffmpeg, gstreamer,
// mfx, msmf or special value 'all')
VIDEOIO_PLUGIN_LIST:STRING=

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for VTK.
VTK_DIR:PATH=VTK_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Include IEEE1394 support
WITH_1394:BOOL=OFF

//Enable ADE framework (required for Graph API module)
WITH_ADE:BOOL=ON

//Include arithmetic decoding support when emulating the libjpeg
// v6b API/ABI
WITH_ARITH_DEC:BOOL=ON

//Include arithmetic encoding support when emulating the libjpeg
// v6b API/ABI
WITH_ARITH_ENC:BOOL=ON

//Enable AVIF support
WITH_AVIF:BOOL=ON

//Include CANN support
WITH_CANN:BOOL=OFF

//Include Clp support (EPL)
WITH_CLP:BOOL=OFF

//Include NVidia Cuda Basic Linear Algebra Subprograms (BLAS) library
// support
WITH_CUBLAS:BOOL=ON

//Include NVidia Cuda Runtime support
WITH_CUDA:BOOL=ON

//Include NVIDIA CUDA Deep Neural Network (cuDNN) library support
WITH_CUDNN:BOOL=OFF

//Include NVidia Cuda Fast Fourier Transform (FFT) library support
WITH_CUFFT:BOOL=ON

//Include DirectML support
WITH_DIRECTML:BOOL=ON

//Include DirectX support
WITH_DIRECTX:BOOL=ON

//Build VideoIO with DirectShow support
WITH_DSHOW:BOOL=ON

//Include Eigen2/Eigen3 support
WITH_EIGEN:BOOL=ON

//Include FFMPEG support
WITH_FFMPEG:BOOL=ON

//Include Flatbuffers support (required by DNN/TFLite importer)
WITH_FLATBUFFERS:BOOL=ON

//Enable FreeType framework
WITH_FREETYPE:BOOL=OFF

//Include GDAL Support
WITH_GDAL:BOOL=OFF

//Include DICOM support
WITH_GDCM:BOOL=OFF

//Include Gstreamer support
WITH_GSTREAMER:BOOL=ON

//Include Halide support
WITH_HALIDE:BOOL=OFF

//Include Ste||ar Group HPX support
WITH_HPX:BOOL=OFF

//Include GIF support
WITH_IMGCODEC_GIF:BOOL=ON

//Include HDR support
WITH_IMGCODEC_HDR:BOOL=ON

//Include PFM formats support
WITH_IMGCODEC_PFM:BOOL=ON

//Include PNM (PBM,PGM,PPM) and PAM formats support
WITH_IMGCODEC_PXM:BOOL=ON

//Include SUNRASTER support
WITH_IMGCODEC_SUNRASTER:BOOL=ON

//Include Intel IPP support
WITH_IPP:BOOL=ON

//Include Intel ITT support
WITH_ITT:BOOL=ON

//Include JPEG2K support (Jasper)
WITH_JASPER:BOOL=ON

//Include JPEG support
WITH_JPEG:BOOL=ON

//Include JPEG XL support
WITH_JPEGXL:BOOL=OFF

//Include Lapack library support
WITH_LAPACK:BOOL=ON

//Include Intel librealsense support
WITH_LIBREALSENSE:BOOL=OFF

//Include Matlab support (opencv_contrib)
WITH_MATLAB:BOOL=OFF

//Include Intel Media SDK support
WITH_MFX:BOOL=OFF

//Build VideoIO with Media Foundation support
WITH_MSMF:BOOL=ON

//Enable hardware acceleration in Media Foundation backend
WITH_MSMF_DXVA:BOOL=ON

//Include NVidia Video Encoding library support
WITH_NVCUVENC:BOOL=ON

//Include NVidia Video Decoding library support
WITH_NVCUVID:BOOL=ON

//Include OpenCV AI Kit support
WITH_OAK:BOOL=OFF

//Include obsensor support (Orbbec 3D Cameras)
WITH_OBSENSOR:BOOL=ON

//Include Microsoft ONNX Runtime support
WITH_ONNX:BOOL=OFF

//Include OpenCL Runtime support
WITH_OPENCL:BOOL=ON

//Include AMD OpenCL BLAS library support
WITH_OPENCLAMDBLAS:BOOL=ON

//Include AMD OpenCL FFT library support
WITH_OPENCLAMDFFT:BOOL=ON

//Include NVIDIA OpenCL D3D11 support

//Include ILM support via OpenEXR

//Include OpenGL support

rivate.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/quaternion.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/quaternion.inl.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/saturate.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/simd_intrinsics.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/softfloat.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/sse_utils.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/traits.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/types.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/types_c.h;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utility.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/allocator_stats.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/allocator_stats.impl.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/buffer_area.private.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/configuration.private.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/filesystem.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/filesystem.private.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/fp_control.private.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/fp_control_utils.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/instrumentation.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/lock.private.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/logger.defines.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/logger.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/core/include/opencv2/core/utils/logtag.hpp; oc/src/morph.simd.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/precomp.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/resize.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/smooth.simd.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/sumpixels.avx512_skx.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/sumpixels.simd.hpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/imgwarp.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/resize.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/accum.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/box_filter.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/filter.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/color_hsv.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/color_rgb.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/color_yuv.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/median_blur.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/morph.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/smooth.sse4_1.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/corner.avx.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/accum.avx.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/imgwarp.avx2.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x/modules/imgproc/src/resize.avx2.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/accum.avx2.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/bilateral_filter.avx2.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/box_filter.avx2.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/filter.avx2.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/color_hsv.avx2.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-fcl4/modules/imgproc/color_rgb.avx2.cpp;C:/FinCap/third_party/opencv-4x-build-f
